title: Annual General Conference 2025
description: Join us for our annual conference gathering leaders from across Bangladesh to discuss progress and future plans.

body: This conference will bring together delegates from all divisions of Bangladesh...

title: National Youth Leadership Workshop
description: A 3-day workshop designed to build leadership skills among student members.

title: Community Service Drive – Eid Relief
description: Distribution of food packages to underprivileged families across 10 districts.

description: A week-long book fair combined with educational seminars on Islamic studies.

title: Inter-University Debate Competition
description: Students from 20 universities compete in a national debate tournament.

body: The competition drew participants from across the country...

title: Winter Blood Donation Camp
description: Volunteer blood donation camp organized in partnership with local hospitals.

body: Over 500 units of blood were collected at this camp...
